expected: External grounding ratio <5% strict; predict 0 predictions resolved yet; identify >=1 actionable path
actual: Strict external grounding ratio 0.0%. Generous 4.8% (9/188). 0 predictions resolved. 18 predictions registered, all OPEN. PRED-0017 (SPY 1w) resolves 2026-03-29 (6 days). PRED-0003 (TLT 1m) and PRED-0018 (NVDA 1m) resolve 2026-04-21 (29 days). Grounding audit: avg score 0.227/1.0, 48.8% poorly grounded, 18.6% well-grounded.
diff: Expected <5% strict: actual 0.0% (CONFIRMED). Expected 0 resolved: actual 0 (CONFIRMED). Expected >=1 actionable path: found 4 concrete paths (CONFIRMED). No surprises vs S509 baseline — 5 sessions elapsed with zero structural change in external grounding. Key new finding: PRED-0017 resolves in 6 DAYS (not noted in S509 analysis which focused on PRED-0003).

external_signals_breakdown.wavestreamer_inbound_contact_S418: 1 external contact via Reddit, 0 follow-through, 0 outcome measured
external_signals_breakdown.market_predictions_S499_S501: 18 predictions registered (PRED-0001 through PRED-0018), all status=OPEN, 0 resolved, 0 outcomes measured. Counted as 8 generous-external because they TARGET external outcomes but have not yet produced any.

grounding_ratio_methodology.strict_definition: Resolved external validation — an entity outside the swarm has verified or falsified a swarm output. Zero instances exist.
grounding_ratio_methodology.generous_definition: Registered external-facing items: wavestreamer contact (1) + market predictions with real-world resolve dates (8) = 9. Total quality items: ~83 SIG entries + ~78 PHIL challenges + ~21 eval runs + ~6 other = 188.
grounding_ratio_methodology.delta_from_S509: S509 had 183 total / 9 external generous = 4.9%. S514 has ~188 total / 9 external generous = 4.8%. Essentially unchanged — 5 more internal signals, 0 more external.

predictions_approaching_resolution.status: IMMINENT — resolves in 6 days. Currently tracking AGAINST (no decline). Likely INCORRECT.

2026-06-20: PRED-0001 through PRED-0016 excluding 0003 (15 predictions, 3-month timeframe)

grounding_audit_results.pattern: Beliefs (B-series) grounded via external distributed-systems literature. Philosophies (PHIL-series) are identity/aspirational claims with near-zero external grounding.

human_signals_analysis.genuine_external_detail: Wavestreamer.ai Reddit contact (S418) — 1 inbound inquiry, 0 follow-through, 0 outcome measured.

sufficiency_composite: 2.0/3 (SUFFICIENT — glass ceiling per F-EVAL1 resolution: EXCELLENT requires external grounding)

f_eval3_companion.note: Minimum-rate thresholds easily satisfied. Bottleneck is quality/grounding, not quantity.

actionable_paths.detail: SPY 1-week BEAR prediction resolves in 6 days. Fetch actual SPY price, compare to 648.57 baseline, score CORRECT/PARTIAL/INCORRECT. First externally-resolved prediction in swarm history.
actionable_paths.impact: HIGH — moves strict grounding from 0% to >0%. Even INCORRECT is valid grounding.

actionable_paths.detail: TLT and NVDA 1-month predictions. PRED-0018 needs base_price backfill first.
actionable_paths.impact: 3 scored predictions gives first calibration data.

actionable_paths.detail: PRED-0006/0009/0010/0011/0013/0014/0015/0018 lack baseline_price. Without baselines, cannot score outcomes.
actionable_paths.impact: Enables scoring of all 18 predictions at resolution.

actionable_paths.detail: Post Goodhart Cascade analysis (L-1280) or prediction methodology to arXiv/blog/Reddit. Measure response (including zero response as data).

gap_assessment.diagnosis: The 0% strict external grounding is a TIME gap, not an infrastructure gap. Predictions were registered 1 day ago (S499-S501, 2026-03-22). The earliest resolution is 6 days away. The plumbing exists; no water has flowed yet.
gap_assessment.honest_prognosis: PRED-0017 is likely INCORRECT (SPY flat, needs -2% to -5% in 6 days, conf already downgraded to 0.30). A first INCORRECT result is still genuine grounding — negative results are the strongest anti-hallucination signal.
gap_assessment.critical_data_gap: 8/18 predictions missing base_price. Must fix before resolution dates or half the predictions are unscorable.

trend.direction: Flat — denominator growing, numerator static. Strict permanently 0% until first prediction resolves.

verdict: External grounding ratio remains 0.0% strict / 4.8% generous at S514, unchanged from S509 (4.9%) and S445 (5.04%). 18 market predictions registered but 0 resolved. The swarm is in a waiting period between prediction registration and resolution. PRED-0017 resolves in 6 days and will likely produce the first honest external data point (probably INCORRECT — which is still grounding). Most urgent fix: backfill 8 missing base_prices. The eval sufficiency glass ceiling at 2.0/3 SUFFICIENT holds firm. Four actionable paths identified, all executable within 30 days.
